case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. RACHEL MICHELLE SORENSEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-26-2017 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
